title: Headset version is changed
scenario: Firmware version not updated on Lens tenant inventory, Device profile, and Device user pages after DFU via mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure the headset is connected and registered to a Lens tenant.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Initiate a firmware update (DFU) on the headset via the app.
5. Wait for the firmware update to complete successfully.
6. Log in to the Lens tenant admin portal.
7. Navigate to the Inventory page and verify the headset's firmware version.
8. Navigate to the Device profile page for the same headset and verify the firmware version.
9. Navigate to the Device user / Mobile user page and verify the firmware version.
expected: The new headset firmware version is correctly reflected on the Lens tenant Inventory page, Device profile page, and Device user/Mobile user page after the DFU completes.
